result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-delice [options] <Path>

Arguments:
  Path                     The path to a .sln, .slnx, .csproj or .fsproj file,
                           or to a directory containing a .NET Core
                           solution/project. If none is specified, the current
                           directory will be used.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.
  -j|--json                Output result as JSON
  --json-output            Path to JSON file rather than stdout
  --check-github           If provided delice will attempt to look up the
                           license via the GitHub API (provided it's GitHub
                           hosted)
  --github-token           A GitHub Personal Access Token to perform
                           authenticated requests against the API (used with
                           --check-github). This ensures the tool isn't
                           rate-limited when running
  --check-license-content  When set delice will attempt to look at the license
                           text and match it against some known license
                           templates
  --refresh-spdx           Refreshes the SPDX license.json file used by the tool
  --similarity             The level of similarity to apply when comparing
                           license contents to the SPDX templates
